repo.name: My First F-Droid Archive Demo
repo.description: These are the apps that have been archived from the main repo.

apps.description:
This app was co-authored by an AI agent (Claude, by Anthropic), directed
and reviewed by a human. See the project's source repository and git
history for the full record of what was generated versus human-directed.

Aether is a generative ambient soundscape player. Every sound — drones, a
choir pad, sub bass, rain, ocean waves, wind, generative bell tones, a
plucked-string arpeggiator, and high shimmer overtones — is synthesized
live with the Web Audio API. No audio samples, no loops.

Features:

* Nine independently-mixed ambient layers
* Five root keys, with the melodic layers generated over a shared,
  slowly-drifting tonal center so they read as one coherent voice
* Five built-in presets
* Reactive audio-driven visualizer
* Fully offline — no network access, no accounts, no tracking
apps.name: Aether
